span: 时间戳、章节名、行号或段落范围
segment_function: concept | setup | workflow | demo | debugging | opinion | promotion | other
summary: 用一到三句话说明这个片段讲了什么。
extraction_status: unreviewed | extracted | duplicate | context_only | noise | outdated | uncertain | needs_human_review
notes: 如果片段里有难以分类但可能很值钱的小 tip，先写在这里，再转为 candidate unit。
